testcase.name: test_daily_checkin
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_audit_45.py:275: in test_daily_checkin assert res.status_code in (200, 400, 409), f"Checkin failed: {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Checkin failed: 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in (200, 400, 409) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_matches_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_audit_45.py:299: in test_matches_endpoint assert res.status_code in (200, 204), f"Matches failed: {res.status_code}: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Matches failed: 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in (200, 204) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_my_predictions

failure.message: AssertionError: My predictions failed: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_audit_45.py:309: in test_my_predictions assert res.status_code == 200, f"My predictions failed: {res.status_code}" E AssertionError: My predictions failed: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_predict_endpoint_structure

failure.message: AssertionError: Upcoming failed: 404 assert 404 in (200, 204) + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_audit_45.py:320: in test_predict_endpoint_structure assert res.status_code in (200, 204), f"Upcoming failed: {res.status_code}" E AssertionError: Upcoming failed: 404 E assert 404 in (200, 204) E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_demand_progress

failure.message: AssertionError: Demand progress failed: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_audit_45.py:349: in test_demand_progress assert res.status_code == 200, f"Demand progress failed: {res.status_code}" E AssertionError: Demand progress failed: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_no_pepsi_parle_in_contesthub_api

failure.message:
AssertionError: Found 'pepsi' in SKUs response assert 'pepsi' not in '[{"sku":"at...rice":1169}]'
'pepsi' is contained here: ? ^^^^^^^^^^^...
...Full output truncated (3 lines hidden), use '-vv' to show

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive_audit_45.py:416: in test_no_pepsi_parle_in_contesthub_api assert "pepsi" not in text, "Found 'pepsi' in SKUs response" E AssertionError: Found 'pepsi' in SKUs response E assert 'pepsi' not in '[{"sku":"at...rice":1169}]' E E 'pepsi' is contained here: E ? ^^^^^^^^^^^...
